title: chrysanthemum douglasii
intro: Chrysanthemum douglasii, also known as Douglas' chrysanthemum or Douglas' goldenweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which make it a natural treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum douglasii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and menstrual cramps, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Chrysanthemum douglasii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
